name: EVkids Distributor Agent
description: Sends approved DraftMessages to students via their preferred channel (email via Inkbox, WhatsApp via Twilio, or SMS). Enforces the human-approval gate — will never send a draft that is not in status=APPROVED. Respects daily quota limits and per-batch pacing to stay within Gmail and Twilio rate limits.

card_data.name: EVkids Distributor Agent
card_data.description: Sends APPROVED DraftMessages to students via email (Inkbox), WhatsApp (Twilio), or SMS. Enforces daily quota and per-batch rate limits. Never sends without status=APPROVED — the hard delivery gate of the EVkids pipeline.

skills.name: Send Approved Drafts
skills.description: Fetches all DraftMessages with status=APPROVED, sends each via the student's preferred channel (email/WhatsApp/SMS), and marks them as sent. Respects daily quota and batch pacing. Returns the list of successfully sent DraftMessages.

limit.description: Max number of drafts to send in this run (default: batch_size)

examples: Send today's batch of approved opportunity emails
Flush pending approved WhatsApp messages to students

skills.name: Send Single Draft
skills.description: Sends a single DraftMessage via the student's preferred channel. Routes to Inkbox (email), Twilio (WhatsApp), or Twilio SMS based on student.preferred_notification_method.
examples: Immediately send a manually assigned opportunity draft
Re-send a previously failed draft after fixing the student's phone number
